_source_text:
MANHATTAN COMMUNITY BOARD 5
Land Use, Housing, and Zoning Committee
Wednesday, March 20, 2024, 6:00 PM
450 Seventh Avenue, Suite 2109, New York, NY 10123

AGENDA

Item 2. ULURP No. C 240089 ZSM — Special Permit Application, 220 West 42nd Street

The applicant, Times Square Hotel Associates LLC, seeks a special permit pursuant to ZR §74-533 to allow a hotel use with ground-floor retail at 220 West 42nd Street, New York, NY 10036. The site is currently zoned C6-4X and the special permit would allow floor area and use modifications under the Special Midtown District regulations.

The Committee will take public testimony and forward a recommendation to the full Board. The public comment deadline is April 3, 2024.
title: ULURP C 240089 ZSM — Special Permit, 220 West 42nd Street
summary: Community Board 5 (Manhattan) to hear a special permit application for a hotel with ground-floor retail at 220 West 42nd Street under Special Midtown District regulations.
